mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.tenant_id, t0.loan_code, t0.debt_begin_date, t0.debt_end_date, t0.loan_money, t0.compensation_money, t0.compensation_date, t0.cooperate_bank, t0.cooperate_bank_branch, t0.is_first_loan_account, t0.loan_rate, t0.loan_pact_code, t0.pled_pact_code, t0.pact_code, t0.guarantee_rate, t0.related_bus_no
